response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and some recent AI-agent/MCP tooling exposure at Google. However, the role targets a Director-level Principal Engineer with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and strategic advisory capability with customers and partners. The resume shows ~13-14 years of relevant engineering experience, no advanced degree in AI, no evidence of recognized AI products built or shipped at scale, and no track record of strategic technical leadership at the director IC level required here.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Google
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and community teaching/talks
concerns: Falls short of 15 years required and lacks Director-level IC or Principal Engineer scope
No demonstrated recognized AI products, platforms, or published AI research/expertise
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners or shaping cloud/AI product strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority mismatch vs. Director-level Principal IC scope
Recent Google exposure to AI-agent and MCP tooling
